title: DarkCraft
description: Attempt to make souls like modpack
body:
# Dark Craft

A challenging souls-like modpack, inspired by souls-like games.

---
If you like games like Dark Souls, and think that vanila is not as challenging as you want?\
Than you shuld check this modpack!

<details>
<summary>New things</summary>

- ☠️ **Bosses**- new hard bosses that will blow your mind(some from original DS games!)
- 🏘️ **Structures**- villages,structures, dungeons, bioms and even new dimention come across your way
- 🗡️🏹🛡️ **Weapons**- a bunch of medieval weapons and armor will become your partners in this adventure 
- 🪄 **Magic**- not a fan of close combat? Than just lear some magic stuff 🤷‍♂️
- 🧟 **Mobs**- new mobs with special abilities, along with old but improved ones, will diversify your gameplay
- ⚔️ **Combat system**-with new figth system you can combine almost every kind of weapon to become unstoppable.
- 🗺️ **New World**-new world generation make your journey memorable. And new Nether with End are filled with new challenges and beautiful views.

</details>

<details>
<summary>!! IMPORTANT !!</summary>
At current state modpack may crush in mp when trying to block player`s arrow with Corrupted Round Shield...
</details>

<details>
<summary>Mod List</summary>
